dleplugin.name: İndirme Yönetim Sistemi Pro
dleplugin.description: Dış link indirme takibi, sayaç, grafik, saat/gün analizi ve kullanıcı bazlı istatistik sistemi
dleplugin.mysqlinstall:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {prefix}_download_stats ( news_id INT PRIMARY KEY, download_count INT DEFAULT 0, last_download DATETIME ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET={charset};
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {prefix}_download_log ( id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, news_id INT NOT NULL, user_id INT DEFAULT 0, username VARCHAR(40) DEFAULT '', ip VARCHAR(45) DEFAULT '', downloaded_at DATETIME DEFAULT NOW(), INDEX idx_news_id (news_id), INDEX idx_user_id (user_id), INDEX idx_downloaded_at (downloaded_at) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET={charset};
dleplugin.mysqlupgrade: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {prefix}_download_log ( id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, news_id INT NOT NULL, user_id INT DEFAULT 0, username VARCHAR(40) DEFAULT '', ip VARCHAR(45) DEFAULT '', downloaded_at DATETIME DEFAULT NOW(), INDEX idx_news_id (news_id), INDEX idx_user_id (user_id), INDEX idx_downloaded_at (downloaded_at) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET={charset};
dleplugin.mysqlenable: REPLACE INTO `{prefix}_admin_sections` (`name`, `title`, `descr`, `icon`, `allow_groups`) VALUES ('download_stats', 'İndirme İstatistikleri', 'Bulut indirme sayılarını takip edin', 'public/adminpanel/images/rebuild.png', '1');
dleplugin.notice: Alan Adı: filepass | Tanım: Dosya Şifresi | Tip: Tek Satırlı Metin ​Alan Adı: download2 | Tanım: Alternatif Link 1 | Tip: Tek Satırlı Metin ​Alan Adı: download3 | Tanım: Alternatif Link 2 | Tip: Tek Satırlı Metin

operation.replacecode:
<?php
/*
=====================================================
 DLE Cloud Tracker - Sayaç Motoru v2.0
=====================================================
*/
if (!defined('DATALIFEENGINE')) { die("Hacking attempt!"); }

function track_download($news_id) {
    global $db, $member_id, $is_logged, $_IP;
    $news_id = intval($news_id);
    if ($news_id <= 0) return;

    // Ana sayaç tablosunu güncelle
    $db->query("INSERT INTO " . PREFIX . "_download_stats (news_id, download_count, last_download)
                VALUES ('$news_id', 1, NOW())
                ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE download_count = download_count + 1, last_download = NOW()");

    // Detaylı log tablosuna yaz
    $user_id  = ($is_logged && isset($member_id['user_id'])) ? intval($member_id['user_id']) : 0;
    $username = ($is_logged && isset($member_id['name']))    ? $db->safesql($member_id['name']) : '';
    $ip       = $db->safesql($_IP);

    $db->query("INSERT INTO " . PREFIX . "_download_log (news_id, user_id, username, ip, downloaded_at)
                VALUES ('$news_id', '$user_id', '$username', '$ip', NOW())");
}
?>

İndirme İstatistikleri", "v2.0 — Sayaç, Grafik, Analiz" ); // Toplam özet $total_stats = $db->super_query("SELECT SUM(download_count) as total_dl, COUNT(*) as total_files FROM " . PREFIX . "_download_stats"); $total_dl = isset($total_stats['total_dl']) ? number_format($total_stats['total_dl']) : 0; $total_files = isset($total_stats['total_files']) ? $total_stats['total_files'] : 0; $total_log = $db->super_query("SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt FROM " . PREFIX . "_download_log"); $total_log = isset($total_log['cnt']) ? number_format($total_log['cnt']) : 0; $total_users = $db->super_query("SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) as cnt FROM " . PREFIX . "_download_log WHERE user_id > 0"); $total_users = isset($total_users['cnt']) ? $total_users['cnt'] : 0; // Son 30 günlük trend verisi (grafik için) $trend_data = []; $trend_labels = []; $db->query("SELECT DATE(downloaded_at) as dl_date, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM " . PREFIX . "_download_log WHERE downloaded_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) GROUP BY DATE(downloaded_at) ORDER BY dl_date ASC"); while($r = $db->get_row()) { $trend_labels[] = date('d.m', strtotime($r['dl_date'])); $trend_data[] = intval($r['cnt']); } $trend_labels_json = json_encode($trend_labels); $trend_data_json = json_encode($trend_data); // Saatlik dağılım (grafik için) $hour_data = array_fill(0, 24, 0); $db->query("SELECT HOUR(downloaded_at) as hr, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM " . PREFIX . "_download_log GROUP BY HOUR(downloaded_at)"); while($r = $db->get_row()) { $hour_data[intval($r['hr'])] = intval($r['cnt']); } $hour_labels = json_encode(array_map(function($h){ return $h.':00'; }, range(0,23))); $hour_data_json = json_encode(array_values($hour_data)); // Haftanın günleri dağılımı $day_names = ['Pazar','Pazartesi','Salı','Çarşamba','Perşembe','Cuma','Cumartesi']; $day_data = array_fill(0, 7, 0); $db->query("SELECT DAYOFWEEK(downloaded_at) as dw, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM " . PREFIX . "_download_log GROUP BY DAYOFWEEK(downloaded_at)"); while($r = $db->get_row()) { $day_data[intval($r['dw'])-1] = intval($r['cnt']); } $day_labels_json = json_encode($day_names); $day_data_json = json_encode($day_data); ?>
  • MENÜYÜ AÇ
  • En Çok İndirilen
  • Trend Grafik
  • Saat / Gün Analizi
  • Kullanıcı Bazlı

Toplam Sayaç

Log Kaydı

Takip Edilen

Üye İndirdi
En Çok İndirilen İlk 50
query("SELECT s.*, p.title, p.alt_name FROM " . PREFIX . "_download_stats s LEFT JOIN " . PREFIX . "_post p ON s.news_id = p.id ORDER BY s.download_count DESC LIMIT 50"); if ($db->num_rows() > 0) { $rank = 1; while($row = $db->get_row()) { $last_date = date("d.m.Y H:i", strtotime($row['last_download'])); $full_link = $config['http_home_url'] . $row['news_id'] . "-" . $row['alt_name'] . ".html"; $badge = $rank == 1 ? 'bg-warning-400' : ($rank == 2 ? 'bg-slate-400' : ($rank == 3 ? 'bg-brown-400' : 'bg-grey-400')); echo " "; $rank++; } } else { echo ""; } ?>
# Yazı Başlığı İndirme Son İşlem İncele
{$rank} {$row['title']} {$row['download_count']} {$last_date}
Henüz veri bulunmuyor.
Son 30 Gün İndirme Trendi
Saatlik Dağılım
Haftanın Günleri
En Çok İndiren Üyeler (İlk 50)
query("SELECT user_id, username, COUNT(*) as cnt, MAX(downloaded_at) as last_dl FROM " . PREFIX . "_download_log WHERE user_id > 0 GROUP BY user_id, username ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 50"); if ($db->num_rows() > 0) { $rank = 1; while($row = $db->get_row()) { $last_date = date("d.m.Y H:i", strtotime($row['last_dl'])); $profile_url = $config['http_home_url'] . "index.php?subaction=userinfo&user=" . urlencode($row['username']); echo " "; $rank++; } } else { echo ""; } ?>
# Kullanıcı İndirme Son İşlem Profil
{$rank} {$row['username']} {$row['cnt']} {$last_date}
Henüz üye indirmesi bulunmuyor.
Son 100 İndirme Logu
query("SELECT l.*, p.title, p.alt_name FROM " . PREFIX . "_download_log l LEFT JOIN " . PREFIX . "_post p ON l.news_id = p.id ORDER BY l.downloaded_at DESC LIMIT 100"); if ($db->num_rows() > 0) { while($row = $db->get_row()) { $dl_date = date("d.m.Y H:i", strtotime($row['downloaded_at'])); $full_link = $config['http_home_url'] . $row['news_id'] . "-" . $row['alt_name'] . ".html"; $uname = $row['username'] ? $row['username'] : 'Misafir'; echo " "; } } else { echo ""; } ?>
Kullanıcı Yazı IP Tarih
{$uname} {$row['title']} {$row['ip']} {$dl_date}
Henüz log kaydı bulunmuyor.

İndirme İstatistikleri
Sayaç, grafik ve kullanıcı analizi
